summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that TJX is currently testing its Daily 100MA support zone near $151.84. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 45.5%. The asset has recently tested this support 2 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $162.39 and a significant trendline confluence around $159.76 (formed by 3 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
